Interface IConstructGeodetic

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that construct various kinds of geodetic curves.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BDA1EEF8-15A0-47CF-91A8-06D4287086CE")]
public interface IConstructGeodetic

Methods

ConstructGeodesicCircle(IPoint, ILinearUnit, double, esriCurveDensifyMethod, double) 

void ConstructGeodesicCircle(IPoint CenterPoint, ILinearUnit LinearUnit, double Radius, esriCurveDensifyMethod densifyMethod, double densifyParameter)

Parameters

CenterPoint IPoint
LinearUnit ILinearUnit
Radius double
densifyMethod esriCurveDensifyMethod
densifyParameter double

void ConstructGeodesicEllipse(IPoint CenterPoint, ILinearUnit LinearUnit, double semiMajorAxisLength, double semiMinorAxisLength, double semiMajorAxisAzimuth, esriCurveDensifyMethod densifyMethod, double densifyParameter)

Parameters

CenterPoint IPoint
LinearUnit ILinearUnit
semiMajorAxisLength double
semiMinorAxisLength double
semiMajorAxisAzimuth double
densifyMethod esriCurveDensifyMethod
densifyParameter double
